codeReview.summary: Final cleanup successfully removed stale documentation and test expectations. Updated 3 E2E test functions to align with simplified runtime: no attestation children spawning, checking state handled as backward-compatible legacy alias, direct attestation on work items instead of child-based flow. Documentation refreshed across README.md, architecture.md, and cogent-work-runtime.md to reflect current state machine and completion gating behavior. All 7 feature requirements satisfied: (1) zero dead attestation code, (2) checking state properly normalized to in_progress via Canonical(), (3) fase references limited to intentional migration code, (4) zero TODO comments outside test fixtures, (5) all tests passing, (6) full validation passed (build/test/vet), (7) make install produces working binary.

sharedStateObservations.observation: E2E test update patterns aren't documented in AGENTS.md. Worker updated 3 test functions in cmd/cogent/e2e_test.go (TestWorkLifecycleCommands, TestDocsRequiredWorkBlocksCompletionUntilRepoDocsAlign, TestWorkArchiveCommands) to align with simplified runtime, but there's no guidance on when to update existing tests vs when to treat test failures as blockers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff shows extensive E2E test updates (lines 712-819 in e2e_test.go changed: removed attestation child expectations, changed checking→in_progress, direct attestation flow). AGENTS.md mentions tests must pass but doesn't document test update conventions or patterns.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The pattern '--glob "!.factory/**"' for excluding mission artifacts from stale-reference searches isn't documented anywhere. Worker used 'rg "fase" --glob "!go.sum" --glob "!.git/**" --glob "!.factory/**"' which is sensible, but future workers might not know to exclude .factory from searches.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification command uses --glob '!.factory/**', discoveredIssues notes that .factory contains historical references. This exclusion pattern isn't in AGENTS.md, .factory/library/, or documented anywhere the worker could have learned it from.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Lifecycle and verification model documentation exists in 3 locations (README.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/cogent-work-runtime.md) with potential for drift. Worker updated all 3 consistently this time, but the duplication isn't called out in AGENTS.md or .factory/library/architecture.md.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Git diff shows identical conceptual updates in README.md (lines 7, 39-47), docs/architecture.md (lines 241-251, 409-419), and docs/cogent-work-runtime.md (lines 127-156). No documentation mentions these 3 files must be kept in sync for lifecycle changes.

summary: PASS: Final cleanup feature successfully completed. All 7 requirements satisfied: no dead attestation code, checking state properly normalized via Canonical(), fase references limited to intentional migration code, zero TODO comments, all tests passing, full validation passed, working binary installed. Code changes focused on documentation and E2E test alignment with simplified runtime. Found 3 shared state observations: (1) E2E test update conventions not documented, (2) .factory exclusion pattern not documented for stale-reference searches, (3) triple-documentation of lifecycle/verification model creates drift risk.
